LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. AFTER HEARING, PLAINTIFFS JAMES CAMPBELL AND MARK LEUTHOLD'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL FOR CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT, CONDITIONAL CLASS/COLLECTIVE ACTION CERTIFICATION, AND ENTRY OF STIPULATED ORDER GRANTING LEAVE TO FILE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. THE FINAL APPROVAL HEARING IS SET FOR AUGUST 26, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-29-2014 CONTINUED TO OCT-28-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT AMERICANTOURS INTERNATIONAL, LLC'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO CARRY ITS BURDEN OF ESTABLISHING THAT THE CONVENIENCE OF NON-PARTY, NON-EMPLOYEE WITNESSES AND THE ENDS OF JUSTICE WOULD BE PROMOTED BY A CHANGE OF VENUE TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY. CCP 397(C). RICHFIELD HOTEL MANAGEMENT, INC. V. SUPERIOR COURT, 22 CAL. APP. 4TH 222, 226 (1994) IS DISTINGUISHABLE. IN THAT CASE, ALL OF THE POTENTIAL WITNESSES LIVED IN THE TRANSFEREE COUNTY. NO SUCH SHOWING HAS BEEN MADE HERE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Emily Barker, Esq. of Seyfarth Shaw LLP, Tel. 415.732.1141, for defendant and moving party;
James Sitkin, Esq. of Dacey & Sitkin, Tel. 415.318.1048, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was not argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT AMERICANTOURS INTERNATIONAL, LLC'S Motion To Transfer Venue is denied. Defendant has failed to carry its burden of establishing that the convenience of non-party, non-employee witnesses and the ends of justice would be promoted by a change of venue to Los Angeles County. CCP 397(c). Richfield Hotel Management, Inc. v. Superior Court, 22 Cal. App. 4th 222, 226 (1994) is distinguishable. In that case, all of the potential witnesses lived in the transferee county. No such showing has been made here. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
